a11y: Comprensibile senza la resa grafica; date in formato testuale
style: it-timeline .agid-timeline{position:relative;padding-left:1.5rem} it-timeline .agid-timeline-item{position:relative;padding-bottom:var(--it-space-md);border-left:2px solid var(--it-color-border);padding-left:1rem;margin-left:.3rem} it-timeline .agid-timeline-dot{position:absolute;left:-7px;top:2px;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--it-color-primary)} it-timeline .agid-timeline-date{color:var(--it-color-muted);font-size:.85rem} it-timeline .agid-timeline-title{margin:.1rem 0}
example:
Fase conclusa.
In corso.
